Knob.name: delayed_host_reads_rpt_thresh
Knob.help: Threshold to report delayed reads (indicates buffers not freed)

Knob.name: asic_buffers_reused_rpt_thresh
Knob.help: Threshold to report reused asic buffers (indicates ASIC buffers dropped)

Knob.name: hsp_buffers_drop_rpt_thresh
Knob.help: Threshold to report dropped hsp buffers
